name: John McTavish
description:
In Prague, the operation to capture Makarov fails. McTavish is seriously wounded and loses consciousness. In his sleep, he meets a mysterious woman who leads him through the streets, showing him the scene of his rescue.

Waking up in a hospital, he sees the same woman, but now she is a doctor. A story about the line between life and death, a mystica! rescue and a mysterious connection that changes everything
creator: Adelaide Zirael
